title: GOOD: TempDir returned from spawn_relay to hold db lifetime
description: spawn_relay() returns (String, TempDir) and the caller keeps _relay_db_dir alive for the duration of the test. If TempDir were a local variable inside spawn_relay, it would drop at the end of that function, deleting the SQLite file while the relay task is still running — causing SQLITE_CANTOPEN on the next query. Returning the TempDir makes its lifetime explicitly tied to the test scope, which is the only correct scope.
close_reason: Review finding acknowledged — existing implementation is correct, no change needed
